description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular structure with a prominent red gable roof and a combination of tan and black exterior siding. The front facade is characterized by two large sets of multi-pane windows flanking a central black section, with tan shutters and trim. On one end, a wooden staircase leads up to a raised entry door, suggesting a slightly elevated foundation. The roof includes four evenly spaced skylights, providing natural light to the interior. The rear and side facades are simpler, with the black siding uninterrupted except for the skylights and minimal trim. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and a focus on practicality.
description: A rectangular bungalow with a red gable roof, tan and black siding, large front windows, and a side staircase leading to an elevated entry. Four skylights punctuate the roof, adding a modern touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large multi-pane windows, tan shutters, and the side staircase leading to the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden staircase and elevated entry door, with the gable roof and skylights visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted black siding and four skylights on the roof, with minimal trim details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain black siding and the gable roof, with no visible entry or windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced skylights on the roof
